creator: vasilyev_igor@inbox.ru
text:
It's a new port with dictionary for StarDict.


[root@ /usr/ports/russian]# shar `find stardict2-dict-eng_RU`
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
# stardict2-dict-eng_RU
# stardict2-dict-eng_RU/Makefile
# stardict2-dict-eng_RU/distinfo
# stardict2-dict-eng_RU/pkg-descr
# stardict2-dict-eng_RU/pkg-plist
#
echo c - stardict2-dict-eng_RU
mkdir -p stardict2-dict-eng_RU > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - stardict2-dict-eng_RU/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >stardict2-dict-eng_RU/Makefile << 'END-of-stardict2-dict-eng_RU/Makefile'
X# Ports collection makefile for: stardict2-dict-eng_RU
X# Date created:    29 Jun 2007
X# Whom:    Vasilyev Igor <vasilyev_igor@inbox.ru>
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME= stardict2-dict-eng_RU
XPORTVERSION= 2.4.2
XPORTREVISION= 1
XCATEGORIES= russian textproc
XMASTER_SITES= ftp://ftp.msiu.ru/education/FSF-Windows/stardict/dicts/
XMASTER_SITE_SUBDIR= stardict
XDISTNAME= stardict-dicts
XEXTRACT_SUFX=   .exe
X
XMAINTAINER= vasilyev_igor@inbox.ru
XCOMMENT= English-Russian/Russian-English dictionaries for StarDict
X
XRUN_DEPENDS= stardict:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/stardict2
XEXTRACT_DEPENDS= unrar:${PORTSDIR}/archivers/unrar
X
XEXTRACT_CMD=    ${PREFIX}/bin/unrar
XEXTRACT_BEFORE_ARGS=   "e"
XEXTRACT_AFTER_ARGS=
XNO_BUILD= yes
X
Xdo-install:
X  ${MKDIR} ${PREFIX}/share/gnome/stardict/dic/
X  ${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKDIR}/* ${PREFIX}/share/gnome/stardict/dic/
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-stardict2-dict-eng_RU/Makefile
echo x - stardict2-dict-eng_RU/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >stardict2-dict-eng_RU/distinfo << 'END-of-stardict2-dict-eng_RU/distinfo'
XMD5 (stardict-dicts.exe) = b4203b67b8196bf271fb5b51ff3c25bf
XSHA256 (stardict-dicts.exe) = 5097cb44f0ce3914b1c13898c8623abd067361f72642b2dfb9b3fb8572549403
XSIZE (stardict-dicts.exe) = 72478164
END-of-stardict2-dict-eng_RU/distinfo
echo x - stardict2-dict-eng_RU/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >stardict2-dict-eng_RU/pkg-descr << 'END-of-stardict2-dict-eng_RU/pkg-descr'
XEnglish-Russian/Russian-English dictionaries for StarDict
X
XWWW: http://stardict.sourceforge.net/
END-of-stardict2-dict-eng_RU/pkg-descr
echo x - stardict2-dict-eng_RU/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >stardict2-dict-eng_RU/pkg-plist << 'END-of-stardict2-dict-eng_RU/pkg-plist'
